prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 28664→28404→31134→29731→31753，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 3100 名；2025 年基准约 31753 名；该校在广东物理类招生计划 2021 年 49 人、2022 年 55 人、2023 年 58 人、2024 年 60 人、2025 年 74 人；2026 年计划 83 人，较 2025 年扩招约 12.2%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 76 位持续上升至 2026 年第 69 位，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；2022 年曾出现学术不端负面舆情（偏负面），但近年无重大声誉事件；抖音热度总排名第 75，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现报考关注度明显升温的信号；作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学均为 A- 学科，农林特色鲜明，与该校招生专业高度匹配，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等社会热门专业持续高热，但该 校以农林类专业为主，与当前主流热门方向存在偏差；广东省 2026 年物理类考生约 45.6 万人，较 2025 年增加约 1.58 万人（+3.6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；该校位于陕西咸阳，属西北地区，在广东无本地招生倾斜；广东考生对省外 985 高校的报考意愿总体平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年物理类大幅扩招（+12.2%）与广东考生小幅增加（+3.6%）的相互对冲，以及学校软科排名持续上升带来的吸引力增强，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 31753 名基础上有所后移；预测最低位次约 34270 名，区间 33770–34770 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28664→28404→31134→29731→31753, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 3100 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 31753; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 49 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 60 in 2024, and 74 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 83, an increase of about 12.2% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen continuously from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2022, there was negative public opinion regarding academic misconduct (somewhat negative), but no major reputation events in recent years; Douyin heat total ranking is 75th, rated as 'average', short video exposure is at a medium-low level, with no clear signal of increased application attention; Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science are all A- disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly sought after, but the university primarily focuses on agriculture and forestry majors, deviating from current mainstream popular directions; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, with the expanded examinee pool intensifying competition; the university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, in the northwest region, with no local enrollment preference in Guangdong; Guangdong examinees' willingness to apply to out-of-province 985 universities is generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the mutual offset of the significant expansion in Physics Category in 2026 (+12.2%) and the slight increase in Guangdong examinees (+3.6%), along with the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will decline from the 2025 baseline of 31753; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 34270, with a range of 33770–34770.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (33770–34770), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<33770), you can focus on popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>34770), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 advantageous agriculture and forestry majors for a higher admission probability.
